org.springframework.ai.anthropic.AnthropicCacheTtl

Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.anthropic
Spring AI integration with Anthropic's Claude models using the official Anthropic Java SDK.
org.springframework.ai.model.anthropic.autoconfigure

    Class
    Description
    enum 
    AnthropicCacheTtl
    Anthropic cache TTL (time-to-live) options for specifying how long cached prompts remain valid.
